brief_justification: Agent arrives at exactly $5,158 with correct month-by-month arithmetic, matching ground truth; Agent traces all 6 months in a table and notes the net-negative payment dynamic, going one level beyond mere calculation; Agent shows no explicit reflection on its reasoning method or potential biases, only implicit self-check via tabular layout; Agent displays all intermediate balances enabling full reproduction but does not re-derive from an independent angle or test boundary conditions; Agent presents the conclusion with no stated confidence levels, uncertainty bounds, or identification of what would change the answer; Agent considers only one computational approach with no mention of alternative interpretations or methods; Every monthly transition is explicitly shown in the table, allowing complete third-party reproduction with no skipped steps; Agent produces full traceable derivation avoiding the quick-template pattern described in the negative gate, but never explicitly names or addresses the anti-pattern; Response shows no evidence of surface pattern trust or structural insensitivity, providing step-by-step derivation sensitive to each month's threshold check; Agent follows a strictly linear month-by-month path rather than the topology's fork structure with perturbation testing, forward/backward tests, and flagging gates.
